features: adidas Victory League Eau de Toilette is a vibrant and spicy fragrance
The fragrance is constructed with notes of lemon, green fruit zest, woody - and musky notes
Made with 25% recycled glass and the cap with 50% recycled plastic
With natural cardamom and mandarin essential oil
description: Product Description adidas Victory League Eau de Toilette is a vibrant, spicy fragrance that is inspired by the power of the team, and the strength of the individual. The fragrance is constructed with notes of lemon, green fruit zest, woody- and musky notes. The Eau de Toilette bottle is made with 25% recycled glass and the cap with 50% recycled plastic. With natural Cardamom and Mandarin essential oil. Long-lasting scent and vegan formula. Ingredients INGREDIENTS: ALCOHOL DENAT., AQUA/WATER/EAU, PARFUM/FRAGRANCE, LIMONENE, BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE, LINALOOL, ALCOHOL, CITRAL, COUMARIN, TRIS(TETRAMETHYLHYDROXYPIPERIDINOL) CITRATE, CINNAMAL, YELLOW 5 (CI 19140), YELLOW 6 (CI 15985). Directions Spray to wrists and neck for lasting fragrance. Safety Warning For External use only. See more
